root_text.an4.77:1.1: “Cattārimāni, bhikkhave, acinteyyāni, na cintetabbāni; yāni cintento ummādassa vighātassa bhāgī assa.
root_text.an4.77:1.3: Buddhānaṁ, bhikkhave, buddhavisayo acinteyyo, na cintetabbo;
root_text.an4.77:1.4: yaṁ cintento ummādassa vighātassa bhāgī assa.
root_text.an4.77:1.5: Jhāyissa, bhikkhave, jhānavisayo acinteyyo, na cintetabbo;
root_text.an4.77:1.6: yaṁ cintento ummādassa vighātassa bhāgī assa.
root_text.an4.77:1.8: yaṁ cintento ummādassa vighātassa bhāgī assa.
root_text.an4.77:1.10: yaṁ cintento ummādassa vighātassa bhāgī assa.
root_text.an4.77:1.11: Imāni kho, bhikkhave, cattāri acinteyyāni, na cintetabbāni; yāni cintento ummādassa vighātassa bhāgī assā”ti.

translation_text.an4.77:1.1: “Mendicants, these four things are unthinkable. They should not be thought about, and anyone who tries to think about them will go mad or get frustrated.
translation_text.an4.77:1.5: The domain of one in absorption …
translation_text.an4.77:1.11: These are the four unthinkable things. They should not be thought about, and anyone who tries to think about them will go mad or get frustrated.”
